description:
Overview:

1. Adjustable seat belt
Traction belt adjustment design, comfortable hand feeling, adjustable length
2. High elastic rope
The high elastic rope prevents the dog from bursting, can stretch and shrink, effectively absorb the dog's impact, and is safer!
3. Telescopic buckle
Car seat belt adjustment buckle, freely adjust the length of the seat belt rope!
4. Nickel-plated zinc alloy hook
The hook is flexible to use, simple to operate, and can be operated with one hand, it is not easy to rust!
5. Plastic lock
Push it up slightly to lock it up, push it down slightly to unlock it
6. The three lines are reflective light
The three lines in the middle will reflect light under strong light!


Product information:

Type: Pet Car Seat Belt
Material: Polyester + Zinc alloy
Applications: for Dogs Cats Pets
Features: Pet Car Seat Belt, Adjustable Safety, for Dogs Cats, Wiring Cables, Avoid Shock, Auto Interior Decoration
Adjustable wristband range: app. 46-66cm / 18.11-25.98in
Adjustable leash range: app.52-70cm / 20.47-27.56in
Black colour

Note:
1. Please allow 0-1cm error due to manual measurement. Pls make sure you don't mind before bidding.
2. Due to the difference between the different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you!

Package Content:

1X traction rope
